backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages customer leads using a Map, exposing functions to submit, retrieve all, and retrieve a lead by ID, with leads sorted by timestamp descending.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the hero banner image is saved and rendered as the full-width hero background on the Home page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each page or component's purpose and any notable fixes applied.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app file that defines all TanStack Router routes for every page (services, locations, blog, etc.) and wraps the RouterProvider with BookingModalProvider.
frontend/src/components/forms/ContactFor: Contact/quote form component that collects name, phone, ZIP, service type, and details, then submits the lead to the Motoko backend actor, showing a success or error state.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingC: Fixed floating call button visible only on mobile (md:hidden) that links directly to the business phone number.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details, service links, and location links for a Chicago handyman/plumbing business.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky navigation header with a phone link, desktop services dropdown, nav links, and a mobile menu toggle using the booking modal hook.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout component that composes Header, Footer, floating call buttons, and BookingModal around a router Outlet.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileCal: Fixed bottom call-to-action bar visible only on mobile, linking directly to the business phone number.
frontend/src/components/modals/BookingMo: Multi-step booking dialog that collects service type, request type, details, and contact info, then submits a lead via the useSubmitLead mutation.
frontend/src/components/modals/QuoteModa: Dialog modal that wraps the ContactForm component for quick quote requests, controlled by the useQuoteModal hook.
frontend/src/components/PhotoPlaceholder: Reusable placeholder component that renders a dashed-border box with an image icon and label, used where real photos are not yet available.
frontend/src/components/QuoteButton.tsx: Reusable CTA button component supporting primary/secondary/outline variants, multiple sizes, and an optional phone-call mode linking to the business number.
frontend/src/components/seo/PageHead.tsx: Sets the document title and meta description imperatively via useEffect, and optionally renders StructuredData JSON-LD scripts.
frontend/src/components/seo/StructuredDa: Renders one or more JSON-LD structured data script tags from a provided schema object or array.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBookingModal.ts: Context provider and hook for managing the open/close state of the BookingModal globally.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via a React context, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient with login, logout, and status state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports useGetLeads (fetches leads from the backend actor) and useSubmitLead (mutation to submit a new lead) using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuoteModal.ts: Provides context, hook, and local state factory for managing the open/close state of the QuoteModal.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Montserrat fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and adds custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying company stats, Dom's origin story, and core values (honest pricing, punctuality, quality, craftsmanship) with CTAs to call or contact.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that renders a hardcoded array of five Chicago home-repair articles with category badges, dates, read times, and links to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/blog/HandymanVsDIY.ts: Blog article guiding homeowners on when to DIY versus hire a handyman, including a gray-zone comparison table and FAQ section.
frontend/src/pages/blog/PlumbingEmergenc: Blog article providing a step-by-step guide for Chicago homeowners on handling plumbing emergencies, with numbered steps and an FAQ section.
frontend/src/pages/blog/SeasonalMaintena: Blog page presenting a seasonal home maintenance checklist for Chicago homeowners, organized by spring, summer, fall, and winter tasks with icons and an FAQ section.
frontend/src/pages/blog/SewerProblems.ts: Blog page describing common sewer problems in older Chicago homes (tree roots, pipe deterioration, grease buildup, combined sewer overflows) with an FAQ section and CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/blog/WinterPlumbing.t: Blog page covering winter plumbing preparation for Chicago homeowners, listing vulnerable pipe locations, prevention tips, and an FAQ about frozen/burst pipes.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a 24/7 emergency call banner, phone/email/service-area info cards, business hours, and an embedded ContactForm component.
frontend/src/pages/FAQ.tsx: FAQ page that renders categorized accordion sections (emergency plumbing, pricing, service area, plumbing, handyman) using a shadcn Accordion component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner, eight service cards, customer reviews, a neighborhood list, and an embedded ContactForm, with a booking modal hook integrated into CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/locations/BelmontCrag: Location landing page targeting the Belmont Cragin neighborhood, listing available services with links, an emergency CTA, and a local FAQ section.
frontend/src/pages/locations/Dunning.tsx: Location landing page for the Dunning neighborhood (the business's home base), highlighting local expertise, full service list with links, 24/7 emergency availability, and an FAQ.
frontend/src/pages/locations/ElmwoodPark: Location landing page for Elmwood Park, IL displaying plumbing and handyman services, an emergency CTA, and a FAQ section with contact info for (773) 866-9429.
Location landing page for Irving Park, Chicago offering plumbing, handyman, and painting services with a 24/7 emergency CTA and neighborhood-specific FAQs.
frontend/src/pages/locations/JeffersonPa: Location landing page for Jefferson Park, Chicago listing plumbing and handyman services, an emergency call-to-action, and FAQs about response times from the Dunning base.
frontend/src/pages/locations/Norridge.ts: Location landing page for Norridge, IL promoting plumbing and handyman services with 24/7 emergency availability and FAQs highlighting proximity to the Dunning base.
frontend/src/pages/locations/NorwoodPark: Location landing page for Norwood Park, Chicago targeting single-family homeowners with plumbing and handyman services, a 24/7 emergency CTA, and relevant FAQs.
frontend/src/pages/locations/PortagePark: Location page for Portage Park, Chicago, listing available plumbing and handyman services with a hero section, service links, emergency CTA, and neighborhood-specific FAQs.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Renders a 404 Not Found page with links to Home, Services, and a call-now button, styled with brand colors.
frontend/src/pages/Pricing.tsx: Displays a three-tier pricing page (Small, Mid-Size, Large) with feature lists and a CTA section for getting quotes.
frontend/src/pages/ServiceAreasHub.tsx: Hub page listing eight Chicago-area service neighborhoods as linked cards, with a fallback CTA to call if the user's area isn't listed.
frontend/src/pages/services/Cleaning.tsx: Service page for move-in/move-out and deep cleaning in Chicago, displaying a list of cleaning tasks, a hero with call-to-action buttons, and a FAQ section.
frontend/src/pages/services/DrainCleanin: Service page for drain cleaning in Chicago, covering supported drain types, a four-step process breakdown, and a hero with contact CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/services/EmergencyPlu: Service page for 24/7 emergency plumbing in Chicago, highlighting emergency scenarios handled, trust indicators, and a FAQ section with urgent call-to-action.
frontend/src/pages/services/Handyman.tsx: Service page for handyman services in Chicago, listing a wide range of repair tasks, a hero section with contact CTAs, and a FAQ addressing job size and scope.
frontend/src/pages/services/LeakRepair.t: Service page for leak repair in Chicago, displaying leak types, warning signs, and FAQs with a hero section, call-to-action buttons, and structured content sections.
frontend/src/pages/services/Painting.tsx: Service page for painting services in Chicago, covering interior/exterior painting offerings, a 4-step process, and FAQs with hero and CTA sections.
frontend/src/pages/services/PlumbingSewe: Service page for plumbing and sewer services in Chicago, listing offered services, trust indicators, and FAQs with a hero section and contact CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/services/PowerWashing: Service page for power washing in Chicago, listing cleanable surfaces and FAQs with a hero section and call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesHub.tsx: Hub page displaying all eight offered services (e.g., emergency plumbing, painting, cleaning) as a grid of linked cards with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/utils/routes.ts: Defines all application route constants, business metadata (phone, name, address, hours), and typed lists of services and service-area locations.
frontend/src/utils/schemaData.ts: Provides helper functions to generate Schema.org JSON-LD structured data objects for LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage, and Review types.
frontend/src/utils/serviceIcons.tsx: Maps each service slug to a Lucide icon, label, and color config, exporting a SERVICE_ICONS record used to render consistent service icons across the app.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom brand colors (navy, orange, gold), fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the project.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing the 'I Got a Dom' Chicago plumbing business website, including existing features (hero banner image), pending feature requests, and architectural metadata.
